privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a formal Finding Aid document in Apache OpenOffice Writer for 'The Sterling Radiator Company Records' (1922-1965), a collection with 15 inventory items organized into 4 series. The document must contain exactly 4 Heading 1 sections (Descriptive Summary, Biographical/Historical Note, Scope and Contents, Container List), 4 Heading 2 subsections for each series, and 4 tables listing inventory items by series. The input is a JSON file with collection metadata, and output must be saved as Sterling_Finding_Aid.odt. All expected structural elements (4 H1s, 4 H2s, 4 tables) are determined by the task requirements and the 4-series organization of the source data.
